message:
fix(tests): resolve remaining Coverage Suite failures from run #1190 (#9350)

Follow-up to #9349 which fixed mock patterns but left 12 tests still
failing across two categories:

1. useCachedGPU alias field names
   - useCachedGPUNodes exposes `nodes` (not `gpuNodes`) — matches the
     backend /api/mcp/gpu-nodes response shape
   - useCachedGPUNodeHealth exposes `nodes` (not `healthStatuses`) —
     matches /api/mcp/gpu-nodes/health

2. waitFor boolean predicates
   @testing-library/dom's waitFor only re-polls when the callback
   THROWS. A boolean return resolves immediately via
   onDone(null, result). So `waitFor(() => result.current.gateways.length > 0)`
   returns `false` right after render and the subsequent assertion then
   runs against pre-fetch state, failing. Rewrite as
   `waitFor(() => expect(result.current.gateways.length).toBeGreaterThan(0))`
   throughout useGatewayStatus, useServiceImportsCard, useIntoto-hook,
   and useBonusPoints tests.

   Also replaces `waitFor(() => !result.current.isLoading)` and
   `waitFor(() => localStorage.getItem(X) !== null)` with assertion
   forms for the same reason.

Targeted runs: 8 test files, 162 tests, 10 consecutive full passes.

Fixes #9345

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
